codeReview.summary: The Claude continuity/rescan work covers the assigned UX requirements: filtered duplicate rows survive drawer open/close, focus is restored to the originating trigger, the live Claude page refreshes in place after rescan, and refreshed row reconciliation prevents ghost or source-swapped rows. I found one non-blocking regression in the broader global rescan action scope.

issues.description: The global command-palette action labeled "Rescan all skills" now calls only `platformStore.rescan()`, which refreshes the live platform page but no longer refreshes Central or Discover data. `CentralSkillsView` and `DiscoverView` still load their own stores only on mount (`src/pages/CentralSkillsView.tsx:243`, `src/pages/DiscoverView.tsx:151`), so invoking the global action from those pages can leave the visible content stale, and Discover also no longer runs its previous `startScan()` path.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared frontend validation command is now stale for this mission scope. The worker needed to extend the test run beyond `.factory/services.yaml`'s `test-frontend-targeted` command to include the newly added drawer and shell tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/services.yaml:6` defines `test-frontend-targeted` as only `src/test/platformStore.test.ts src/test/PlatformView.test.tsx src/test/SkillDetailView.test.tsx src/test/skillDetailStore.test.ts`, but the handoff records validation with `src/test/SkillDetailDrawer.test.tsx` and `src/test/AppShell.test.tsx` added (`/Users/happypeet/.factory/missions/a998172c-79b0-469d-a170-fcefe54fb0eb/handoffs/2026-04-22T17-14-31-301Z__claude-platform-continuity-and-rescan__2c754dfe-01ac-4127-95d2-07f6562aa0aa.json:16,45,60`).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Native Tauri verification for this mission still depends on ad hoc macOS accessibility scripting to drive the command palette and capture evidence, but that workflow is not documented as a reusable shared recipe.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The transcript skeleton for worker session `2c754dfe-01ac-4127-95d2-07f6562aa0aa` shows repeated `osascript`, JXA, and Quartz/ApplicationServices Python inspection before the rescan interaction succeeded; shared docs currently stop at high-level guidance in `.factory/library/user-testing.md` without the concrete automation steps.

summary: Pass. The feature satisfies the Claude continuity/rescan mission with no blocking issues. One non-blocking follow-up remains: the global "Rescan all skills" action is now platform-only and can leave Central/Discover pages stale.
